titleStmt.title: SII 10.362: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 362. (A.R. No. 217 of 1905.) ON THE BASE OF THE WEST WALL OF THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1181. (Siddhārthi)

summary.p: States that Allāḍa Pemmaya-Mahārāja who claims to be of the Pallava family gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī Anēkamahīmaṁḍalarājādhirājarājaparamēśvara . pallavakulatilaka bhāradvājagōtra lalitārtthacaṁdra khaṭvāṁgadhvajaṁḍu
vāyupaṟighōṣaṇa vṛṣabhalāṁchana veṁgaḷanātha kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvara kāmakōṭyaṁbikālabdha varaprasāda . nijasēvakābhāva
baṁdhujanāśraya rūpakaṁdarpa bhūlōkacāturvarṇa dhāma pratiṣṭitābharaṇa digvijayā rtthi śrīparvatapūrvadiśānasapta śatāgrahāra
pratiṣṭitāmukkaṁṭikāḍuveṭṭi vaṁśāvatāru laina śrīmatu maṁḍalēśvara Iṁmaḍibasava saṁkara jagadagōpāla Allāḍavemmaya
dēvamahārājulu svasti śakavarṣaṁbulu 1181 Agu nēṁṭi siddārtthisaṁvatsara caitraśu 15 maṁ . nāṁṭi davanaparvanimittamuna śrītripu
rāṁttakaśrīmahādēvara Akhaṁḍadīpāna kiccinamōdālu 25
Digital edition of SII 10.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
